data.body:
[9/5 (Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault.

▶ Total number of players banned: 9
▶ Period: Permanent
More details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?thread=2272725

#BlueArchive
